data.title: Blend to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: In San Francisco, Blend Labs, Inc. (NYSE: BLND), a prominent digital origination platform, revealed plans to unveil its second quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market closure on Thursday, August 6, 2026. The company is set to conduct a conference call to delve into these results at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. Interested individuals can find a link to the live call on the company's Investor Relations website at investor.blend.com, along with the earnings.

data.title: AppFolio, Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Continuing its strong performance, the year 2026 saw a remarkable 19% increase in revenue for the company. Alongside this impressive revenue growth, profitability also expanded significantly. These positive financial results suggest a prosperous year for the company, with promising indicators for future success.

data.title: NextNav Announces Date for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: NextNav Inc., a trailblazer in next-generation positioning and 3D geolocation, is set to disclose its second-quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2026, post-market closure on Tuesday, August 11, 2026. The company, traded as [NASDAQ: NN], will hold a conference call on the same day at 5:00 PM ET to delve into the outcomes. Interested participants can register for the conference call by visiting the specified website ahead of, or on, the day of the event.

data.title: Heartflow to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 13, 2026
data.description: California-based Heartflow, a pioneer in AI solutions for coronary artery disease, is set to unveil its financial performance for Q2 2026 post-market closing on August 13, 2026. Traded as HTFL on Nasdaq, the company will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. The announcement signifies a crucial juncture for investors and industry enthusiasts keen on Heartflow's status and trajectory in the realm of CAD technology.

data.title: MacroGenics Provides Clinical Update on Ongoing Phase 1 Study for MGC026
data.description: MacroGenics, Inc. shared details on their Phase 1 trial of MGC026, a new B7-H3-directed antibody-drug conjugate, for treating advanced solid tumors. The study includes a topoisomerase I inhibitor-based linker-payload. Results, including dose escalation and early data on tumor-specific cohorts, will be presented at the ESMO 2026 Congress in Madrid, Spain on October 23-27, 2026. MacroGenics (NASDAQ: MGNX) is a biopharmaceutical company specializing in antibody-based cancer therapies.

data.title: Waterstone Financial, Inc. reports Q2 2026 earnings performance.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has significantly dropped to 4.5%, showcasing a positive trend in job growth. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs this quarter, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong labor market. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the past month, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts predict continued growth in the upcoming months, attributing the success to various government initiatives and increased consumer spending. Overall, the economic outlook appears promising, with hopes for sustained progress in key sectors.

data.title: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 28, 2026
data.description: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals International, plc (Nasdaq: KNSA) disclosed on July 23, 2026, that it is set to conduct a conference call and live webcast on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the event is to present the financial results for the second quarter of 2026 and highlight recent portfolio activities.

data.title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. Announces Its Second Quarter Distribution
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (NASDAQ:DMLP) revealed its cash distribution for the second quarter of 2026. The amount of $1.272943 per common unit reflects the Partnership's operations from April 1 to June 30, 2026. This distribution will be paid on August 13, 2026, to common unitholders recorded as of August 3, 2026.

data.title: Cytokinetics to Announce Second Quarter Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: In South San Francisco, California on July 23, 2026, Cytokinetics, Incorporated (Nasdaq: CYTK) disclosed its plans to reveal second-quarter figures on August 6, 2026, at 4:00 PM ET. Subsequently, the company's senior leadership will conduct a conference call at 4:30 PM ET to delve into the financial results and give updates on the business.

data.title: Generational Group Advises Custom Engraving Studio in its Sale to Ownership Group of HPC Global
data.description: Dallas-based Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of Custom Engraving Studio to the Ownership Group of HPC Global. The deal, completed on February 27, 2026, saw the transfer of ownership of the York, Pennsylvania-based family-owned engraving company. Custom Engraving Studio is known for its expertise in custom engraving, awards, personalized gifts, promotional items, and specialty decorating services. This acquisition marks a strategic move in the mergers and acquisitions space within the privately held businesses sector.

data.title: In 2026, the crypto sector is projected to boost US economy by $55B, creating 232,000 jobs nationwide: NCA study.
data.description: A recently published study indicates that by 2026, cryptocurrency companies are projected to create or support approximately 232,000 jobs throughout the United States economy.

data.title: Taco Celebrates First Graduating Cohort of Manager Development Program, Reinforcing Commitment to Leadership Growth
data.description: In Cranston, Rhode Island, on July 23, 2026, Taco reported the successful completion of the inaugural Manager Development Program (MDP). This two-year program aims to cultivate a cadre of competent leaders worldwide within the company. The MDP is designed to provide internal leaders with essential strategies for effective leadership.
